intro: Vanda scripta, also known as the Vanda orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Vanda scripta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
